title: Technology Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Technology Manipulation.gif|thumb|400px|[[Royal Pain|Gwen Grayson]] manipulating technology]]

==Summary==
The ability to '''alter and control technology''', often exercised through the usage of other powers, such as manipulating [[Electricity Manipulation|electricity]], [[Information Manipulation|information]], [[Magnetism Manipulation|magnetism]], and [[Metal Manipulation|metals]], or just [[hacking]]. Often called '''technopaths''', these characters can use their abilities for a variety of purposes, such as altering and reshaping machinery, hacking into advanced computer systems, creating viruses, and so on.

This does not refer to the ability to simply operate technology, no matter how advanced, but the power to influence and manipulate it on a deeper, often supernatural level, though, rather than some [[magic]]al aspect, it may be achieved through sufficiently advanced technology. It may involve [[Nanotechnology]] or [[Cyborgization]], for instance.

==Users==
* [[Brainiac (Pre-Crisis)|Brainiac]] and [[Cyborg (Post-Flashpoint)|Cyborg]], among others ([[DC Comics]])
* [[Croix Meridies]] ([[Little Witch Academia]])
* [[Doctor Doom]], [[Iron Man (Marvel Comics)|Iron Man]], and [[Ultron (Marvel Comics)|Ultron]], among others ([[Marvel Comics]])
* [[Sigma (Mega Man)|Sigma]] and other Reploids ([[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man X]])
* [[Dark Samus]] and other [[Phazon]] users ([[Metroid (Verse)|Metroid]])
* [[Nagato (Pain)|Nagato]] and other Rinnegan users ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
